subcodes.first_line: O spiritual leaf of the divine Tree, illumined by the effulgent rays of the Sun of the horizon of Divine Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه الروحانیه من السدره الربانیه از فیض تجلی شمس افق توحید بانوار
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
